steps.title: Identify the appositive structure
steps.content: The blank contains “drummer” and “Dennis Chambers,” where the name functions as an appositive renaming or clarifying the descriptor.

steps.title: Apply the restrictive appositive rule
steps.content:
A restrictive appositive provides essential identifying information and uses no commas.

Since “Dennis Chambers” is the essential identification for which drummer is meant, the correct form is “American drummer Dennis Chambers.” Choices A and D incorrectly add commas (treating it as nonrestrictive), and choice B adds only a trailing comma.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
